description_long: This object is a tall, slender potted plant with numerous thin, green stems and small, delicate leaves growing densely along the stalks. The plant is housed in a round, reddish-brown terracotta pot with a simple, unadorned design and a slightly flared rim. The foliage appears healthy and vibrant, with the stems reaching upward in a somewhat wild, vertical arrangement. The pot is filled with dark soil, visible at the base of the plant, and the overall appearance suggests a hardy, fast-growing species. A small white plant identification label is attached to one of the stems, providing information about the plant. This potted plant would be well-suited for placement on the ground in an outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environment, such as a patio, sidewalk, or garden corner.
description: A tall, leafy green plant with thin stems in a plain terracotta pot, featuring a visible plant label. The arrangement is upright and lush, ideal for outdoor urban placement.
description_view_0: Tall green plant in a reddish-brown pot, with a plant label visible among the stems.
description_view_1: Front view showing the plant label more clearly attached to a stem, with dense foliage.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the vertical growth and the plain, round terracotta pot.
description_view_3: Rear view with the plant's leafy stems and the unadorned pot, label less visible.
attribute_plant_species: herbaceous vine (possibly sweet pea or similar)
